channel.title: lookupsid.py on geobour98
channel.description: Recent content in lookupsid.py on geobour98

item.title: TryHackMe - VulnNet: Roasted
item.description: Introduction This is a TryHackMe room which can be found at: VulnNet: Roasted VulnNet Entertainment quickly deployed another management instance on their very broad network… Reconnaissance & Scanning Perform nmap scan to identify open ports and services treating the host as online. Command: nmap -p- -T4 -Pn -v 10.10.232.200 geobour98@kali:~$ nmap -p- -T4 -Pn -v 10.10.232.200 Starting Nmap 7.93 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2022-11-08 13:51 EET Initiating Parallel DNS resolution of 1 host.
